description:
Speak, don't type

Speak naturally, and Typeless will turn your words into polished messages, emails, and documents that read like you carefully typed them - in real time. 4x faster than typing.
Meet Typeless 2.0.0

- Dictate the way you think
  Typeless now follows your thoughts, not just your words. Drop in a side note, and it stays as context instead of becoming text. Describe a name you can't recall, and Typeless fills in the exact one without making things up. Speak in any order, and Typeless organizes your thoughts by what matters. Change your mind, even later, and only your final decision stays.
- Set multiple target languages for Translate
  Communicate in the exact language you need for each conversation. You can now set multiple target languages in advance, then switch to the one you need whenever you use Translate.
- Enterprise plan for your organization
  Get enterprise-grade security and admin controls for how Typeless is accessed, managed, and deployed across your organization. Contact us about this plan.
- Home screen redesigned
  Home screen now feels lighter and clearer, making it easier to see how Typeless helps you write with less effort and adapts to the way you write.
Thanks for using Typeless. We hope Typeless 2.0.0 makes voice a more natural part of how you write, communicate, and work.
Learn more
